name: Grapefruit Juice
description: A bitter citrus fruit juice. Contains concentrated furanocoumarins (such as bergamottin and dihydroxybergamottin) which are potent, irreversible suicide-inhibitors of the intestinal CYP3A4 enzyme, delaying compound clearance and raising systemic toxicity risk of numerous drugs and herbs.
preparation: Standard fresh or commercial fruit juice.
safetyAlert: Safe alone, but strictly contraindicated with multiple medications and active botanicals due to severe metabolic enzyme suppression.
interactions: Irreversibly inhibits intestinal CYP3A4 and modulates P-glycoprotein, dramatically raising serum levels and toxicity risk of Artemisinin, Artemether, Metronidazole, and multiple pharmaceuticals.
